What We Do

Outdoor services built
to impress

Lawn Care

Mowing, edging, fertilization, and aeration. We keep your lawn thick, green, and envy-worthy all season long.

Landscape Design

Custom planting plans, bed installations, and full property transformations designed around your lifestyle.

Hardscaping

Patios, walkways, retaining walls, and outdoor living spaces built with quality materials that last decades.

Seasonal Cleanups

Spring refresh and fall cleanups to keep your property sharp year-round — leaf removal, pruning, and mulching.

Custom Outdoor Projects

Fire pits, water features, outdoor kitchens, lighting. Whatever your vision — we'll bring it to life.

Our Story

Built on
great work

"Campbell's Landscaping is built on one simple idea — do great work and treat every property like it's our own."

We started small, with a truck and a belief that homeowners in State College deserved better. No shortcuts. No cookie-cutter solutions. Just craftsmanship, reliability, and real care for every project we touch.

From routine lawn care to full outdoor transformations, we show up with the same level of dedication every single time. That's what's kept our clients coming back — and sending their neighbors our way.

— Campbell's Landscaping Team
